description_long: A large, round wheel of Swiss-style cheese with a pale yellow color sits atop a rectangular wooden board. The cheese features numerous round holes of varying sizes distributed throughout its body, characteristic of Emmental or similar cheeses. A single wedge-shaped slice has been cut and separated from the main wheel, revealing the same holey interior. The cheese has a smooth, slightly matte surface with no visible rind or outer coating. The wooden board beneath is light brown with a subtle grain pattern, providing a rustic presentation. The overall appearance is appetizing and typical of cheese served in urban food markets or outdoor gatherings.
description: A pale yellow, hole-filled wheel of Swiss-style cheese with a wedge cut out, displayed on a wooden board. The cheese has a smooth, matte surface and no visible rind.
description_view_0: The cheese wheel is shown with a large wedge cut out and placed slightly apart, revealing the holey interior and smooth surface on a wooden board.
description_view_1: The wedge is positioned in the foreground, showing the cut face with prominent holes and the main wheel behind it.
description_view_2: The back of the cheese wheel is visible, with the wedge further away and the holes distributed across the exposed surfaces.
description_view_3: The cheese wheel is viewed from the opposite side, highlighting the round shape, holey texture, and the missing wedge.
